name: Apocalypse ? No !
short_description: In Apocalypse? No! you play as a survivor accompanied by his faithful dog in a world in ruins, survive against the creatures, help the characters of this world, discover very varied maps: From a peaceful forest, through survivor camps to ruined cities.
detailed_description:
In Apocalypse ? No ! you play a survivor accompanied by his faithful Apocalypse? No!, you play as a survivor accompanied by his faithful dog in an apocalyptic world, survive against the creatures, help the characters of this world and face the Apocalypse.

---- Discover content update 1.6.0.0! ----

A new mob, the new NPC system, two new achievements, and many other improvements await you in update 1.6.0.0!

A world in ruins.

Discover many varied maps: From a peaceful forest, through survivor camps to ruined cities, these maps are just waiting to be explored. In total, there are 36 different cards available in the game.

A world divided into 4.

These lands are ruled by 4 main factions:

  • The democratic regime of the army

  • The regime's rebels

  • Independent Survivors

  • Religious fanatics

What are the objectives of the game?

In Apocalypse? No! your main objective is to survive against the creatures that want to kill you. When you start a game, you appear with only a knife an a gun. As you progress in your game, you will unlock additional weapons as well as objects allowing you to defend yourself. During your exploration, you will meet many NPCs, some of whom will need your help. Throughout the game, you will have the opportunity to educate your dog: teach him to follow you, to defend you or to look for treasures.

Survive against the creatures of the region.

The apocalypse has caused the appearance of many creatures! Zombies, slimes, hiders, didirocks, as well as radioactive creatures like giant insects or radioactive animals. Also find passive creatures like wolves, rats, chickens, rabbits and more!

Complete all 40 quests in the game!

Many non-player characters populate these lands, some of them need your help. Help them by providing them with resources, protecting them from tough enemies, and more!

Survive with your companion...

You can teach your companions to defend you against zombies, search for treasures, or even defend positions!

against merciless creatures...

Game Modes:

In order to diversify your games, different game modes are available:

  • Normal mode

  • Apocalypse Mode (Apocalypse Mode allows you to face tougher creatures, you will also have a new constraint: hunger.)

  • Hardcore apocalypse mode (Hardcore apocalypse mode takes the constraints of hardcore mode, but adds an additional constraint: death is definitive.)

  • Time trial mode (Time trial mode challenges you to survive within a given time. In order to gain time on the counter, you must kill the creatures. If the countdown reaches 0, it is the end of the game.)

Each game mode allows you to enjoy a local co-op mode included:

supported_languages: English, French, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal
